note: Verified comprehensive test coverage exists for event data parsing and timezone conversion: 5 test files with 100+ test cases covering EventDto JSON serialization, EventTimeDisplay UTC/local conversion, timezone edge cases (DST transitions across multiple hemispheres), and event day grouping. All pure Dart tests pass; flutter_test-dependent tests have correct logic but cannot compile in this environment due to Flutter SDK version mismatch (framework issue, not code issue).
